title: Commercial Opportunity Sub-Agent Output (v1)
description: Structured output from the commercial_opportunity sub-agent. Captures TAM (typically inferred), mcap-vs-opportunity ratio, standard-of-care drugs for the indication + their limitations + side-effect profile, unmet medical need severity (1-5), the asset's regulatory incentives, and a brief competitive-landscape headline. Hard-validated before return; failure routes to failed_reactor_events with source='sub_agent.commercial_opportunity'. Phase 2b of the v4 architecture simplification (~/.claude/plans/proud-booping-seal.md).

tam_estimate.description: Estimated total addressable market in USD. is_inferred MUST be true when TAM is not grounded in a primary market-research source (typical case — mark conservatively).

mcap_to_peak_revenue_ratio.description: Ratio of current company market cap to estimated peak annual revenue at full uptake. Null when sponsor mcap is unknown or peak-revenue cannot be sized.

standard_of_care.description: Drugs currently approved + commonly used for the indication. Empty array allowed only when truly no SoC exists.

soc_limitations.description: Where current therapies fall short: efficacy ceiling, durability, contraindications, dosing burden, response rates.

soc_side_effects.description: Treatment-emergent adverse events of the current standard of care. Sourced from openFDA label adverse_reactions where possible.

unmet_need_severity_1_5.description: 5 = no adequate therapy exists / mortality-driving unmet need; 4 = poor existing options with major side-effect burden; 3 = adequate options exist but improvement clearly valuable; 2 = mild incremental need; 1 = crowded category with strong existing options.

regulatory_incentives.description: FDA designations the asset has received or is likely eligible for. Always include at least one entry — use ['none'] when no designations apply.

competitive_landscape_summary.description: One-paragraph headline + structured differentiation read. Detailed competitor enumeration is the `competitive` sub-agent's responsibility; this is the commercial-context summary.

sourcing_completeness_pct.description: Self-reported coverage of the schema fields backed by retrieved evidence (not inferred). Drives evidence_quality at Stage 1.
